---
title: "test_rpc_phase_89.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_rpc_phase_89.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 4
logic_score: 5.80
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.99
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestRPCPhase89, setUp. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.rpc](file://src.cstar.core.rpc)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `TestRPCPhase89`
- `setUp`
- `test_get_recent_traces_empty`
- `test_get_architectural_suggestions_parsing`
- `test_get_dashboard_state_structure`
